title: chromolaena quercetorum
intro: Chromolaena quercetorum is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Chromolaena quercetorum include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to treat various skin conditions and infections. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, from fever and sore throats to wounds and skin irritations.
